short_summary: Iran deal signing imminent, markets up
rationale: The US-Iran peace deal signing expected Friday is the dominant story for US residents — markets soaring and oil falling are confirmed market moves, but the deal itself is not yet signed; this is the most impactful ongoing development for Americans.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal signing Friday; ceasefire holding; markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: Confirmed ceasefire holding and deal signing imminent — stock markets already soaring and oil falling are real economic impacts for US residents. Questions and risks flagged by BBC remain.

top_events.title: Trump says Tren de Aragua gang leader killed in US strike
top_events.summary: Confirmed killing of Venezuelan gang leader operating in the US — continuation of established domestic security operation, no new qualitative escalation.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for espionage
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China — continuation of established pattern of US-China tensions; no new qualitative escalation beyond prior cycle.
